name: appointment-booking-system
description: API testing environment for Appointment Booking System

scripts.test:report: npx mkdirp reports && newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html
scripts.test:full: npm run validate:openapi && npm run test:api

author: René F. Ruano
